name: quantbit-terminal
description: Quantitative stock trading, backtesting, and portfolio management terminal for the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

scripts.build: npm run build:db && vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs && npm run build:vercel
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const c=process.env.FIREBASE_CONFIG; if(c) require('fs').writeFileSync('firebase-config.json', c); else if(!require('fs').existsSync('firebase-config.json')){console.error('firebase-config.json missing'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.vercel-build: npm run prebuild && npm run build
scripts.copy:data: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.cpSync('data', 'functions/data', { recursive: true });"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('functions/index.js', { force: true }); fs.rmSync('functions/data', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('api/index.js', { force: true });"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run copy:data && npm run build:functions && firebase deploy
